title: Peppery Croatian Pork Crustacean
description: This energizing croatian dish combines white wine vinegar with pork and crustacean alternatives for a savory and tangy twist.

ingredients.name: crustacean alternative (such as mushrooms or tofu)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add pork cubes and crustacean slices to the pan. Cook until they start to brown, around 5 minutes.
Pour in white wine vinegar and red pepper flakes. Stir well to combine with the ingredients, reducing heat if needed to prevent burning.
Season with salt according to taste, then cook for an additional minute or two until everything is heated through.
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh parsley before serving as a snack.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
